name: LocalAI
compose:
name: slashnode-localai
services:
  api:
    image: localai/localai:v4.5.0
    container_name: localai
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MODELS_PATH: /models
      LOCALAI_BACKENDS_PATH: /backends
      LOCALAI_EXTERNAL_BACKENDS: cpu-llama-cpp
    volumes:
      - api_data-models:/models:cached
      - api_data-backends:/backends:cached
      - api_data-data:/data:cached
      - api_data-configuration:/configuration:cached
      - api_data-images:/tmp/generated/images/
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8793:8080
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  api_data-models:
    name: slashnode-localai_api_data-models
  api_data-backends:
    name: slashnode-localai_api_data-backends
  api_data-data:
    name: slashnode-localai_api_data-data
  api_data-configuration:
    name: slashnode-localai_api_data-configuration
  api_data-images:
    name: slashnode-localai_api_data-images
